description_long: This is a modern three-seater sofa upholstered in a medium-dark gray fabric, featuring three large, plush back cushions and two smaller, square accent pillows in a muted gold color. The seat consists of a single, continuous cushion, providing a streamlined and contemporary look. Draped over the right side of the sofa is a textured, dark gray throw blanket, adding a touch of coziness and visual interest. The armrests are gently flared and padded, matching the sofa's overall fabric and providing comfortable support. The sofa stands on four short, square wooden legs, slightly visible beneath the base. The overall design is clean and inviting, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern gray three-seater sofa with plush back cushions, gold accent pillows, and a draped dark throw blanket, supported by short wooden legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing three large back cushions, two gold accent pillows, a single seat cushion, and a dark throw blanket draped over the right side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the thickness of the cushions, and the draped throw blanket covering part of the seat and armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous gray fabric back and the sofa's overall width, with no cushions or pillows visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the throw blanket's coverage, the gold accent pillow, and the sofa's armrest profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose back cushions and a single, continuous seat cushion; two small, loose accent pillows placed at the corners; all cushions are uniform in size and shape.
attribute_armrest_style: Armrests are present, gently flared outward, padded, and rise slightly above the seat level with a rounded profile and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, square wooden legs positioned at the corners, exposed and slightly recessed under the sofa base, with a simple block style and natural wood finish.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight backrest with three large, loose cushions forming a continuous but segmented appearance; no tufting or decorative stitching visible.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray fabric with a subtle woven texture; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
